figures.caption: Fig. 3: Qualitative comparison of signal quality between the MST map and the proposed WMST map (Best viewed with 300% zoom).

Fig. 4: Qualitative comparison of predicted HR predictions between RS+rPPG and the proposed method on the VIPL-HR dataset. We have segmented all of the predictions into four segments for ease of visualization (Best viewed with 300% zoom).
Fig. 1: Qualitative comparison between the MST map and the proposed WMST map. Darker regions mean lower weights, and brighter regions mean higher weights (Best view by 300% zoom).
